title: PaLM: Scaling Language Modeling with Pathways

defines.name: PaLM
defines.definition: A 540-billion-parameter densely activated Transformer language model trained to study the effects of scaling on few-shot learning and broad language capabilities.

problem: Existing language models had not yet been studied at this scale, and the paper addresses how scaling affects few-shot performance, reasoning, multilingual ability, and safety-related behaviors.
